offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in validating vendor invoices cause late payments. We automate vendor invoice validation and payment scheduling instead of manual invoice validation and payment scheduling.
problem: Delays in vendor invoice validation and payment scheduling
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Enable CSV import for existing vendor data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
